file_insights.before_state: failure report documenting dyld_start hangs and inability to complete acceptance
file_insights.after_state: comprehensive verification report with all acceptance criteria met
key_sections: make check verification (446 tests passed, zero clippy warnings)
file_insights.structured_format: markdown with emoji status indicators, line references to source code, and detailed requirement tracking

patterns_discovered.description: Combines automated testing (make check output) with manual code review (factory.rs line-by-line analysis)
patterns_discovered.benefit: Avoids runtime execution blockers while maintaining thorough verification

patterns_discovered.description: Documents verification against specific numbered requirements with explicit ✅ checkmarks and line numbers
patterns_discovered.benefit: Provides clear audit trail and makes completeness immediately visible

patterns_discovered.description: Credits previous work (Wave 6, commit 3f3f219) and establishes chain of responsibility
patterns_discovered.benefit: Establishes confidence in feature maturity and historical context

patterns_discovered.description: Documents both installation path (lines 359-415) and uninstallation path (lines 639-674) separately
patterns_discovered.benefit: Ensures bidirectional operations are complete and safe

gotchas_discovered.context: Previous session attempt (session 3) encountered dyld_start hangs with locally built binaries
gotchas_discovered.solution: Current approach uses code review instead of binary execution
gotchas_discovered.lesson: When environment has runtime constraints, shift to static analysis and code review verification

gotchas_discovered.context: Task was verification-only (no code changes required), but could have been misconstrued as requiring implementation
gotchas_discovered.solution: Clearly stated 'No code changes were required' in conclusion
gotchas_discovered.lesson: Explicitly clarify task scope when previous context showed failing implementations

approach_outcome.task: Write output/result.md summarizing verification results for Spec 014
approach_outcome.strategy: Comprehensive verification combining automated test results with detailed code review
steps_taken: Verified make check passes all 446 tests with zero clippy warnings
approach_outcome.result: SUCCESS - Comprehensive verification document produced with all requirements validated

recommendations.recommendation: Continue using structured requirement-tracking format with explicit ✅ checkmarks and source line references
recommendations.rationale: Makes verification completeness immediately visible and auditable

recommendations.recommendation: When runtime blockers exist, establish code review as first-class verification method with equal weight to automated testing
recommendations.rationale: Avoids replicating environment-specific failures and maintains momentum

recommendations.recommendation: Maintain chain of responsibility by documenting which spec/wave introduced each feature being verified
recommendations.rationale: Establishes feature maturity and provides context for future modifications

recommendations.recommendation: Explicitly list each acceptance criterion from spec.md and verify against actual deliverables section-by-section
recommendations.rationale: Prevents criterion gaps and provides clear coverage report
